calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-10-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK FSB'S Motion To Vacate Settlement is off calendar as moot. On March 12, 2015, plaintiff filed a dismissal of the entire action. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)
